articles.title: Drive slower, go electric, don't drive at all? Americans weigh options for saving gas - NPR
articles.description: With gasoline prices averaging above $4 a gallon nationally, drivers are grappling with a sharp rise in fuel costs. Here are some ideas to consider if you're trying to cut your fuel costs.
articles.content:
Nationally, gasoline prices are averaging more than $4 a gallon
. That's not an all-time record, but it's up sharply from just over a month ago, and the rapid change has left many car owners reeling… [+8340 chars]
